# Taylor (NotGreg) — Relationship Context — February 19, 2026

---

## Where the Relationship Stands

This is the second meeting with Taylor. Rapport has been established. The PA connection (both tied to Collegeville) made the relationship feel more real and less like a cold-DM situation. Hannah joined partway through — she's Taylor's 19-year-old sister and 50% business partner; her presence signals Taylor is treating this as a legitimate business relationship.

Taylor has shown up consistently with offers and no hard asks. His communication style is high-energy and verbose, but the substance is real. He hasn't pushed on anything Dax said no to (bookmaking, Stripe switch).

---

## Taylor's Motivations

- Genuinely impressed by DD's Discord setup and wants to learn from it
- Wants to grow his own Discord community (live music/concerts) and doesn't know where to start
- Sees Dax as a business mind worth connecting with long-term
- Wants to build a referral/payment processing relationship (Dax introducing business owners)
- Is a self-described degenerate gambler and wants a trusted source for betting research

Taylor offered to send company links and vendor contacts at the end of the February 17 call. It is unknown whether those were sent. **Verify before advancing to any formal arrangements** (referral income, banking, payment processing).
